description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a metallic silver and black color scheme. The body is constructed primarily from metal, with a robust upper receiver and a long, vented barrel that extends forward, capped by a prominent muzzle. The grip is ergonomic and made of black polymer, paired with a matching magazine and a squared trigger guard. The top of the shotgun is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the fore-end is sleek with minimal external controls. The overall build suggests a semi-automatic action, with no visible pump or lever, and the stock is a compact pistol grip style without a traditional shoulder rest.
description: A modern, metallic silver and black tactical shotgun with a long vented barrel, ergonomic black grip, and a full-length Picatinny rail. It features a pistol grip stock and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the vented barrel, Picatinny rail, pistol grip, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle opening, barrel venting, and the alignment of the rail and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the pistol grip, and the entry point for the magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, vented design and no visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with a robust profile and no finger grooves
